provenance.source_corpus: Effects of crossing distance on performance of the native wildflower Lobelia siphilitica: Implications for ecological restoration1

source_spans.text: Geographic distance was estimated as the straight-line distance between Home and Away populations.
Crosses between populations with dissimilar precipitation accumulated less biomass than crosses between populations that received similar amounts of precipitation
Crosses between populations with dissimilar temperatures produced smaller seeds than crosses between populations with similar temperatures
crosses between populations with dissimilar precipitation produced more seeds per fruit than crosses between populations with similar precipitation
crosses between distant populations set fewer seeds per fruit than crosses between geographically proximate populations
between-population crosses produced larger seeds than within-population crosses

edges.original_sentence: Geographically proximate L. siphilitica populations had more similar annual mean temperatures than distant populations
